spec.name: The Odd Room With Smooth Walls
spec.description: As you enter you hear a loud click from one of the walls... and you fall and fall and fall... . . . . ... And come to an abrupt end. THIS is strange indeed. There is an arched entryway leading down.

down.description: Down. It is utterly dark that way, though you can make out an intersection of sewer pipes leading west, north and east.
